‘Dhurandhar 2’ earns Rs 1,665 cr in 3 weeks, misses ‘Dhurandhar’ record
description: 'Dhurandhar 2' experiences a slowdown, concluding its third week with Rs 110.60 crore. Despite surpassing its predecessor's lifetime earnings, the spy action film failed to break 'Dhurandhar's' third-week collection record. The movie's domestic net collections reached Rs 1,048.42 crore, with a global gross of Rs 1,665.23 crore.

title: Tamil Nadu polls: Sasikala takes front seat, invokes Jaya's name & style
description: V.K. Sasikala, once Jayalalithaa's shadow, now leads her own campaign from a similar vehicle, evoking memories of the late leader's roadshows.  She delivers short speeches, indirectly criticizing AIADMK leaders and seeking public support, while her party fields candidates, primarily in southern districts, aiming for crucial votes and recalling her close association with Jayalalithaa.

'Jana Nayagan' 5-minute clip leaked online; fans react
description: Thalapathy Vijay's final film, 'Jana Nayagan,' faces a setback as a five-minute clip, including title credits and his introduction, has leaked online, sparking fan outrage. The movie, already delayed due to CBFC issues, has seen its release date postponed indefinitely. Fans expressed disappointment and urged against sharing the leaked footage.

title: 27 lakh out of Bengal rolls after adjudication, maximum from Muslim, Matua belts
description: Murshidabad's Shamsherganj and Lalgola constituencies saw the highest voter deletions post-adjudication, with 74,775 and 55,420 names removed respectively. This comes amidst a larger purge of 27 lakh voters across Bengal, sparking concerns and protests, particularly in Muslim-dominant and Matua-dominated areas. Electoral rolls for the second phase have been frozen, with a court review pending.

description: Alwar police have arrested Archana Arora, wife of an ICICI Bank regional head, and her alleged lover, Rishabh Sharma, for conspiring to kill her husband. The complaint details an illicit relationship, alleged theft of valuables, and an attempted murder. Archana later retracted a rape accusation against Rishabh, then allegedly threatened her husband for more money.

description: Meta's new AI model, Muse Spark, powering its AI assistant, has drawn criticism for prioritizing benchmarks over real-world utility. This initial model, designed for speed and capability, is set to power Meta's platforms soon.
